entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Tanungin mo muna ako bago magpaliwanag nang sobra."

entries.source: "Business English words"
entries.value: "Negosyo English mga salita"

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Suriin muna ang sagot ko bago ibigay ang sa iyo."

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Bigyan mo ako ng mas mahirap na bersyon pagkatapos kong subukan."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Panatilihin itong beginner-friendly."

entries.source: "SAT vocabulary"
entries.value: "SAT bokabularyo"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Gumamit ng mga halimbawa mula sa exam, proyekto, o araw-araw kong buhay."

entries.source: "Words about weather"
entries.value: "Mga salita tungkol sa weather"

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI mga prompt

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang tiny una gawain.

entries.source: Communication
entries.value: Komunikasyon

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: End kasama ang isang recap ikaw magsulat yourself.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build vocabulary with meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, and quick practice.
entries.value: Para sa ito mode, ang gawain ay simple: Bumuo ng bokabularyo kasama ang meaning, mga halimbawa, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, at quick pagsasanay.

entries.source: For Vocabulary Builder, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Para sa Bokabularyo Builder, isang kapaki-pakinabang loop ng pagsasanay ay:

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Mahusay mga prompt karaniwan isama tatlo things: ang paksa, iyong kasalukuyan antas, at ang kind ng tulong ikaw gusto. Ikaw gawin hindi kailangan perfect wording. Ikaw lamang kailangan enough konteksto para sa ang session sa magsimula.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Kung ang response feels too broad, narrow ito. Humingi ng isa halimbawa, isa maling akala, isa suriin tanong, o isa susunod hakbang. Kung ito feels too madali, Humingi ng isang challenge. Kung ito feels too mahirap, Humingi ng isang bridge mula sa ano ikaw na alam.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Gumawa ng ang output mas marami kapaki-pakinabang

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Vocabulary Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Prompt mga ideya at isang nauulit loop sa pag-aaral para sa getting kapaki-pakinabang pag-aaral mga resulta mula sa Bokabularyo Builder sa inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Pagbabasa isang AI response ay hindi ang same bilang pag-aaral. Pagkatapos ang una sagot, magtanong ang mode gumawa ikaw gawin something kasama ang ideya.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Kaugnay mga landas sa pag-aaral

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request feedback sa ang part na felt hindi tiyak.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Respond bago pagtatanong para sa ang solusyon.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Magsimula kasama ang isa malinaw request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Estado ang layunin sa isa sentence.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: study skills sa pag-aaral

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Na huli recap ay important. Kapag ikaw Ipaliwanag ang ideya likod, ikaw reveal Ano ang solid at Ano ang pa rin borrowed mula sa ang AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for vocabulary builder with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ang pinakamahusay mga session sa pag-aaral ay adjustable. Ito mode ay tuned para sa bokabularyo builder kasama ang nito own mga prompt, mga halimbawa, at pag-aaral flow.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Vocabulary Builder is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Ang pinakamabilis na paraan para makakuha ng halaga mula sa Vocabulary Builder ay bigyan ang AI ng gawain sa pag-aaral, hindi lang paksa. Sinasabi ng paksa kung ano ang interesado ka. Sinasabi ng gawain sa pag-aaral kung anong uri ng tulong ang kailangan mo.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Pagkatapos add isang constraint na gumagawa ang session mas marami personal:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Subukan isa ng mga ito starters:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Gawing ang mode inmagsanay

entries.source: Use Vocabulary Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Reading Companion. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Gamitin Bokabularyo Builder kapag ito ay ang tama mode para sa ang gawain. Kung ikaw gusto isang kaugnay landas, subukan Pagbabasa Companion. Ikaw Maaari bang also Tingnan ang AI pag-aaral blog para sa study mga paraan, Socratic pag-aaral, mga flashcard, roleplay, at aktibong pag-alala.

entries.source: Vocabulary Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Bokabularyo Builder mga prompt at loop sa pag-aaral
